# PHIL.079 ? Ordinary Language Philosophy

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** contemporary
**Subcategory:** ordinary_language_philosophy
**Domain:** CONTEMPORARY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Everyday language use; dissolve philosophical problems through linguistic analysis; language games; family resemblances

## Application
Analyze ordinary usage; dissolve pseudo-problems; recognize language games; avoid abstract theorizing; practical linguistic philosophy

## Key Values
- Ordinary usage
- Linguistic therapy
- Language games
- Practical analysis
